---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Felines
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is this related to a problem? Describe it.

A clear description of the problem or gap you've noticed. Ex: "I'm
always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the solution you'd like

What would you like to happen? Be as specific as you can.

## Which user profile would benefit most?

- [ ] The Conflicted — annoyed by cats near their home, looking for a
      way to resolve the friction
- [ ] The Curious — doesn't have a strong opinion yet, just wants to
      understand what's going on
- [ ] The Ready to Act — found a cat or a situation and wants to know
      what to do right now
- [ ] The Averse — actively dislikes or fears cats, needs a
      non-judgmental way in
- [ ] The Caretaker — already feeding/managing a colony, needs tools to
      do that better
- [ ] Not sure / applies to everyone

## Does this align with Felines' principles?

- [ ] Collaboration over competition
- [ ] Action before commitment (useful without requiring an account or
      a big first step)
- [ ] Education through logic, not emotion

If you're not sure, that's okay — describe the idea anyway and we can
figure it out together in the discussion.

## Alternatives you've considered

Any other ways to solve the same problem you thought about, and why you
think this one's better (or why you're not sure).

## Additional context

Mockups, links, related issues, or anything else that helps explain the
idea.
